name: cortex-plugin-notion
description: Bidirectional sync between Cortex sessions and Notion — query databases, create and update pages, search workspaces, and sync agent memories to Notion documents
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: notion_query_database
tools.description: Query a Notion database with filters and sorts. Returns matching pages as structured JSON.

params.name: database_id
params.description: Notion database ID (UUID from the database URL)

params.name: filter
params.description: JSON string of Notion filter object (see Notion API docs). Leave empty for all pages.

params.name: sorts
params.description: JSON string of Notion sorts array

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results per page (default: 100, max: 100)

tools.name: notion_get_page
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion page by ID with all its block content.

params.name: page_id
params.description: Notion page ID (UUID from the page URL)

params.name: include_children
params.description: Whether to include child blocks (default: true)

tools.name: notion_create_page
tools.description: Create a new page in a Notion database or as a standalone page.

params.name: parent_id
params.description: Parent database ID or parent page ID

params.name: parent_type
params.description: Type of parent

params.name: title
params.description: Page title

params.name: properties
params.description: JSON string of Notion page properties (for database children)

params.name: content
params.description: Markdown content to convert to Notion blocks in the page body

tools.name: notion_update_page
tools.description: Update an existing Notion page's properties and/or content.

params.name: page_id
params.description: Notion page ID to update

params.name: properties
params.description: JSON string of properties to update

params.name: content
params.description: Markdown content to append or replace

params.name: mode
params.description: How to handle content: append to existing or replace

tools.name: notion_search
tools.description: Search across the Notion workspace for pages and databases matching a query.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query text

params.name: filter_type
params.description: Filter results to only pages or databases

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results (default: 20)

tools.name: notion_list_databases
tools.description: List all databases accessible to the integration, with titles and IDs for use with other tools.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results (default: 100)

tools.name: notion_sync_memory
tools.description: Sync Cortex session memories and summaries to a Notion database. Creates or updates entries for each memory item.

params.name: database_id
params.description: Target Notion database ID for syncing memories

params.name: memories
params.description: JSON array of memory objects with title, content, tags, and timestamp

fields.label: Default Database ID
fields.description: Default Notion database ID to use when none is specified

tools: Claude Code (Anthropic) — initial scaffold and implementation
